howItWorks.header_title: From Inquiry to Clean Energy in 4 Steps
howItWorks.header_subtitle: We've streamlined every part of the process so you can focus on what matters — saving money and the planet.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.desc: We discuss your energy efficiency goals and provide a preliminary cost estimate — completely free of charge.

steps.title: Site Survey & Design
steps.desc: Our engineers visit your property, analyze roof orientation, shading, and structural capacity. We then create a custom system design.

steps.title: Installation
steps.desc: Our certified crew installs your system in 1–3 days. We handle all permitting, inspections, and grid connection paperwork.

steps.title: Activation & Support
steps.desc: Your system goes live and starts generating savings immediately. We provide ongoing maintenance and technical support.

projects.p1_desc: Agrivoltaics combine agriculture and solar energy in a symbiotic system. By elevating panels above farmland, this technology optimizes land use, improves soil moisture through shading, and creates a resilient microclimate for sustainable food production.
projects.p2_desc: Floating solar, or floatovoltaics, installs photovoltaic modules on bodies of water. These systems reduce evaporation, mitigate algae growth, and benefit from natural water cooling that enhances energy efficiency compared to land-based arrays.

services.header_subtitle: From the first sketch to proactive lifetime optimization — we handle every step of your solar journey.

items.title: Architecture & Engineering
items.text: Custom solar system design based on site mechanics, energy goals, and architectural flow. We manage structural analysis and complete permitting.

items.title: Deployment & Grid Integration
items.text: Precision panel mounting, inverter calibration, and flawless grid integration. We prioritize operational speed and technical rigor, maintaining uncompromising safety standards across every project.

items.title: Endurance & Optimization

faq.label: Frequently asked
faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before going solar.

items.q: What happens to panel efficiency after 10 years of operation?
items.a: Our premium photovoltaic modules have a degradation rate of just 0.4% per year — significantly below the industry average of 0.7%. After 10 years, your system will still operate at approximately 96% of its original capacity. After 25 years, we guarantee a minimum of 87.4% output.

items.q: How does the system perform during a full grid blackout?
items.a: Systems equipped with our hybrid inverter and battery package automatically switch to island mode within 20 milliseconds — fast enough that most appliances won't even register the outage. Standard grid-tied systems without storage will shut down per regulatory requirements.

items.q: How does the system perform during cloudy days or in winter?
items.a: Modern high-efficiency modules are highly sensitive to the full light spectrum, meaning they generate power even on overcast days. While production is lower in winter due to shorter days, our system architecture is optimized for low-light efficiency, ensuring a steady energy flow year-round.

items.q: Do I need to manually clean the panels or perform any maintenance?
items.a: Sunberg systems are designed for minimal maintenance. In most climates, rainfall is sufficient to keep panels clean. However, our technical support and modernization programs ensure that your system remains in peak condition with periodic expert health checks.

items.q: Can I integrate my electric vehicle (EV) charging into the solar ecosystem?
items.a: Absolutely. Our smart-home energy sync allows you to prioritize EV charging when solar production is at its peak. This "Solar-to-EV" logic ensures your car is powered by the cleanest and cheapest energy available, maximizing your savings.

items.q: How do you calculate ROI projections and what assumptions do you use?
items.a: Our projections use 10-year localized irradiance data from satellite sources, actual utility rate escalation trends (typically 3–5% annually), verified panel degradation curves, and your real consumption profile. We deliberately model conservative scenarios — our clients typically outperform projections by 8–12%.

items.q: What warranties are provided for the system components?
items.a: We only partner with Tier 1 manufacturers, providing a standard 25-year linear performance warranty for modules and 10-to-15 year warranties for inverters and storage systems. Additionally, Sunberg provides a comprehensive structural integrity guarantee for the entire installation.

items.q: Is it possible to expand the system capacity in the future?
items.a: Yes. Our modular architecture is designed for scalability. We can easily add more storage capacity or integrate additional panels as your energy needs evolve, ensuring your investment grows with you.

hero.label: Our Mission
hero.desc: Founded on the principles of technical rigor and environmental stewardship, Sunberg is more than a solar provider. We are architects of energy independence, bridging the gap between high-end engineering and sustainable living.

philosophy.label: Our Philosophy
philosophy.desc: We believe that solar energy should enhance, not compromise, the aesthetic and structural value of your property. Our approach combines refined minimalist design with rigorous engineering standards.

principles.title: Structural Respect
principles.text: We don’t just mount systems; we integrate them. Every design respects the architectural integrity and aesthetic flow of your property.

principles.title: Longevity First
principles.text: We engineer for the decades, not the years. Our systems are built to outlast a generation using the most resilient materials and components.

principles.title: Strategic Freedom
principles.text: For Sunberg, energy independence is the ultimate expression of freedom. We design resilient ecosystems that empower you with total sovereignty over your power production, providing autonomy from grid constraints and a clear path to a self-sufficient future.

manifesto.text: “We don't just install solar panels; we design energy ecosystems that empower communities and preserve the architectural soul of our landscapes.”

values.title: Environmental Stewardship

deepDive.label: Engineering Journey
deepDive.title: Technical Deep Dive
deepDive.intro: Explore the rigorous phases of our engineering process, from advanced design modeling to proactive system maintenance.

tabs.label: Analysis
tabs.title: Advanced Site Mapping
tabs.text: Every Sunberg project begins with an exhaustive site analysis. Our engineers utilize advanced simulation software to evaluate shading dynamics and environmental factors, optimizing your roof's solar potential with absolute precision.

tabs.label: Design
tabs.title: Architectural Concept
tabs.text: We prioritize aesthetic harmony, selecting premium components that complement your property's architecture while maximizing energy harvest through advanced geometry.

tabs.label: Modules
tabs.title: Premium Module Engineering
tabs.text: We utilize advanced photovoltaic modules with industry-leading efficiency, designed for superior performance and minimal degradation over their extended lifespan.

tabs.label: Inverters
tabs.title: Hybrid Conversion Power
tabs.text: Our hybrid inverters are the brains of your system, capable of seamless battery integration and millisecond-fast backup transitions. Efficiency is prioritized at every stage of power conversion.

tabs.label: Mounting
tabs.title: Wind-Rated Integrity
tabs.text: Our anodized aluminum mounting systems are engineered to withstand extreme conditions. Every fastener is designed for maximum pull-out resistance and long-term structural integrity.

tabs.label: Support
tabs.title: Unwavering Partnership
tabs.text: Our commitment to your energy independence doesn't end with installation. We stand by our work, ensuring you're never left alone and that expert help is always just a call away.

tabs.label: Evolution
tabs.title: Technological Lifecycle
tabs.text: We maintain a complete digital blueprint of your system configuration. As solar technology advances, we proactively reach out with modernization options to keep your investment at the cutting edge.

floatBanner.label: Innovation Focus
floatBanner.desc: Installation of floating solar farms on reservoirs. Water naturally cools the modules, increasing energy output by 5-10% while reducing evaporation by 70%.

hardware.label: Ecosystem Care
hardware.title: Hardware Integrity

revolution.header_subtitle: The numbers speak for themselves. Solar energy isn't a future possibility — it's the current reality.
revolution.ch1_title: A new solar roof appears in Europe every 30 seconds
revolution.ch1_text: While you've been reading this page, several more families have declared their energy independence. The scale of adoption is unprecedented, transforming neighborhoods into self-sustaining power plants.
revolution.ch2_title: Solar generation surpassed coal in the US for the first time
revolution.ch2_text: A technology that dominated the global energy landscape for over a century is yielding to something cleaner. We are witnessing a tectonic shift: the end of the fossil fuel era and the rise of the sun as the world's primary engine.
revolution.ch3_title: One panel saves 13 tons of coal over its life
revolution.ch3_text: Your roof isn't just space; it's a massive untapped resource. A single 500W panel prevents an entire truckload of coal from being mined and burned.
revolution.ch4_title: Half of all new power capacity worldwide is now solar
revolution.ch4_text: In just a decade, solar's global share grew from 0.5% to 6%. Current trajectories show that solar will dominate the grid by 2030. This is the only logical path forward for a resilient power system.
revolution.ch4_text_mobile: In just a decade, solar's global share grew from 0.5% to 6%. Current trajectories show that solar will dominate the grid by 2030.
revolution.ch5_title: Your Roof Is Your Most Valuable Asset
revolution.ch5_text: Homes with solar panels sell for 4.1–6.8% more on average. It's a dual benefit: you eliminate monthly liabilities while adding tens of thousands to your net worth.
revolution.ch5_text_mobile: Homes with solar panels sell for 4.1–6.8% more on average. You eliminate monthly liabilities while adding tens of thousands to your net worth.
revolution.ch5_accent: Solar pays you twice: first on your utility bills, and finally on your property valuation.
